character.name: Pixel art character design of a seductive evil female dark sorceress, beautiful and alluring, voluptuous curvy body with wide hips, large bust, and hourglass figure, pale skin with glowing green arcane runes on her arms and torso. She has long flowing black hair with green streaks, glowing crimson eyes, sly seductive smile with dark lipstick. She wears a very revealing dark fantasy outfit: skimpy black leather and lace straps, deep cleavage, bare midriff, short torn cloak draped over one shoulder, thigh-high spiked boots.  Seductive yet dangerous pose, one hand on her hip, leaning slightly forward, mysterious green magic aura and shadows around her, evil sensual atmosphere, dramatic lighting, high detail pixel art, clean lines, retro RPG style, dark fantasy character sprite, alluring villainess
